err_upload_too_large: ❌ Upload aborted! File is too large for the web server (limit reached or out of memory).
err_target_exists: ❌ File '%s' already exists in the target directory!
err_bulk_move: ❌ Error moving files. No files were moved.
err_bulk_delete: ❌ Error deleting files. No files were deleted.
err_not_file: ❌ File not found or it is a directory!
err_dir_delete_failed: ❌ Error deleting directory! (Not empty or missing permissions?)
ok_status_removed: ✅ Status removed! File successfully released for VDR import.
ok_pc_delegate:
✅ File delegated to PC (.pc_encode)!
The file is now ignored by VDR. You can drag and drop it from your Windows network share (Samba) into Handbrake to encode it!
desc_upload: Uploads a file from this computer directly to the target directory (Right).
confirm_bulk_delete: REALLY IRREVERSIBLY delete all selected files?
confirm_bulk_move: Move all selected files to the right?
confirm_delegate:
Handbrake Workflow:

1. Confirm with OK here.
2. Open Handbrake on your PC.
3. Import the file via the Samba network share.
4. Place the finished video back here.

Rename now (.pc_encode)?
confirm_single_move: Move this file to the right?
confirm_delete_dir: REALLY delete this directory in the target? (Must be empty!)
confirm_delete_file_dst: REALLY IRREVERSIBLY delete this file in the target directory?
